2604.24911.title: Learning with Embedded Linear Equality Constraints via Variational Bayesian Inference
2604.24911.paper_summary: Machine Learning is becoming more prevalent in science and engineering, but many approaches do not provide meaningful uncertainty estimates and predictions may also violate known physical knowledge. We propose a Bayesian framework to embed linear relationships across inputs and outputs into the learning process, whilst characterizing full predictive uncertainty over both the model parameters and the domain knowledge. We evaluated our method on learning the single particle battery model subject to voltage and energy balances, showing its ability to provide reduced credible intervals and constraint violations compared to standard Bayesian neural networks based on variational inference.
2604.24911.paper_summary_zh: 機器學習在科學和工程中變得越來越普遍，但許多方法並未提供有意義的不確定性估計，且預測可能違反已知的物理知識。我們提出了一個貝葉斯框架，將輸入和輸出之間的線性關係嵌入學習過程中，同時對模型參數和領域知識的全面預測不確定性進行表徵。我們對學習單粒子電池模型進行了評估，該模型受電壓和能量平衡的影響，顯示出與基於變分推斷的標準貝葉斯神經網絡相比，能夠提供縮小的可信區間和約束違反。
2604.24911.author: Matthew Marsh et.al.
2604.24911.authors: Matthew Marsh, Benoît Chachuat, Antonio del Rio Chanona
